description_long: This is a tall, narrow chest of drawers with a modern, minimalist design. The exterior is finished in a dark wood veneer, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The front features four evenly spaced drawers, each with a small, round, dark knob handle centered on the drawer face. The sides and back are plain, with no additional ornamentation or features. The top surface is flat and can be used to support small objects or decor. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of engineered wood or MDF, with metal hardware for the handles and drawer slides.
description: A tall, dark wood chest of drawers with four drawers and round knob handles, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: The left side of the chest, showing a plain, flat panel with a dark wood finish and no visible features.
description_view_1: The back of the chest, featuring a solid, unadorned dark wood panel.
description_view_2: The front view, displaying four drawers with centered round knob handles, all in a dark finish.
description_view_3: The right side of the chest, identical to the left, with a plain, dark wood panel.
